text:
shipped a few things this week to keep the garden growing. 

1. auto top-ups for Pollen credits. because running out of juice mid-generation is a buzzkill. set it and forget it.
2. Pollenforge-CLI is now in the build. for those who prefer the comfort of their terminal.
3. added Storytale to the greenhouse — multiplayer storytelling powered by AI.

code is open, as always. check the repo to build something weird with us.

#pollinations #opensource #aitools #pixelart #creativecoding #indiedev #buildinpublic #commandline #gamedev
